message:
fix(mcp/codec): split mcp test imports under fuzz cfg; migrate codec arb_mouse_event to frankenterm_term types

Two follow-ups to the codec/mcp story that showed up while the sibling
commits were landing. No production feature/behaviour changes.

crates/frankenterm-core/src/mcp.rs — the module's test imports live in a
single `#[cfg(test)] use mcp_types::{...}` block. That block pulls in
`EventsParams, GetTextParams, MissionAbortParams, MissionExplainParams,
MissionPauseParams, SearchParams, SendParams, StateParams,
WaitForParams, WorkflowRunParams` — a set of types that are only
referenced by the Param-shape tests, which are compiled out when the
`fuzz` feature is enabled because it pulls in a different `mcp_types`
surface. Under `--features fuzz --tests` the current shape was
triggering `unused_imports` hard errors. Split the imports into two
blocks:

  - `#[cfg(all(test, not(feature = "fuzz")))]` for the Params subset
    above; only compiled when regular tests are run.
  - `#[cfg(test)]` for the remaining test-only types (`MCP_VERSION`,
    `McpEventsData`, `McpGetTextData`, `McpMissionControlData`,
    `McpMissionStateData`, `McpPaneState`, `McpRuleItem`,
    `McpSearchHit`, `McpWaitForData`, `McpWorkflowRunData`,
    `TruncationInfo`, and the `default_*` helpers
    `apply_tail_truncation`, `default_cass_context_lines`,
    `default_cass_limit`, `default_cass_offset`,
    `default_cass_timeout_secs`, `default_events_limit`,
    `default_tail`, `default_timeout_secs`, `default_ttl_ms`,
    `default_wait_tail`) which both surfaces provide.

Production imports in the same file are unchanged.

frankenterm/codec/tests/proptest_codec_roundtrip.rs — the codec's
`MouseEvent` wire type moved from the bit-flag-based
`termwiz::input::{MouseButtons, MouseEvent}` to the richer
`frankenterm_term::{MouseButton, MouseEvent as TermMouseEvent,
MouseEventKind}` pair. Rewrites the test's mouse-related strategies
accordingly:

  - `arb_mouse_buttons` → `arb_mouse_button`: now returns a single
    `MouseButton` enum value, with branches for `None`, `Left`,
    `Middle`, `Right`, and the four wheel variants
    (`WheelUp/WheelDown/WheelLeft/WheelRight`) carrying a
    `1usize..=8` magnitude.
  - New `arb_mouse_event_kind()`: strategy over `MouseEventKind`
    used by the new `MouseEvent` record.
  - Imports pruned to `use termwiz::input::{KeyCode, KeyEvent,
    Modifiers};` with the mouse types now pulled from
    `frankenterm_term::{Alert, ClipboardSelection, MouseButton,
    MouseEvent as TermMouseEvent, MouseEventKind, TerminalSize}`.

No serialization/wire-format tests disabled; the roundtrip assertion
still holds over the full strategy space post-migration.
